steps.title: Read slope of k directly from coefficients
Perpendicular slope = negative reciprocal
steps.content: Slope of $j = -\frac{1}{-6/19} = \frac{19}{6}$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice A, $\frac{19}{6}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
